pdg_reference: Workman et al. (PDG), Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001 (2024)
sigma_source: PDG 2024 RPP (Workman et al., Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001, 2024)
panel_selection_note: These 85 states comprise every PDG-listed excited baryon and meson resonance in \texttt{data/hadron\_published\_masses.json} after removing ground $\pi/K$ (\texttt{meson\_light\_ps}) and baryon-octet entries; no states were omitted or pre-selected for agreement.
sigma_pull_policy: Table n_sigma uses max(PDG sigma, 0.01 * mass) as a readout-resolution floor; n_sigma_listed uses published PDG sigma without flooring.
